checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: The task has a dedicated execution contract, scope manifest, allowed scope, blocked scope, acceptance criteria, validation commands, stop conditions, merge policy, deployment policy, final report, audit packet, and ChatGPT/Codex audit.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: Missing closure evidence was added for issue-172 and issue-177; ledger reconciliation entries were added for run IDs sb-20260608-abcd0172, sb-20260609-cc04eda9, sb-20260609-b3bc65dc, and sb-20260609-06e1b8e9; PR #204 merged; the reconcile scope is completed; CURRENT_GOAL no longer says PR #200 is open or failing; dashboards were regenerated; doctor reports healthy action_count=0.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: The diff is limited to governance evidence, ledger, current goal memory, generated dashboards, post-merge closure evidence, and task audit artifacts; no scripts, workflows, operator decisions, issue #194 lifecycle, or digital twin implementation changed.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: No protected files, secrets, production configuration, billing, authentication, authorization, databases, dependency installation, CI/CD security controls, or deployment automation were touched.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: The scope manifest declares every changed file and only the declared reconcile paths changed.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Required local validation suite includes dashboard generation, doctor health, contract validation, scope validation, final report validation, audit packet validation, ChatGPT audit validation, full smoke, and diff check.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub checks passed on PR #204: Foundation Validation, SpecBridge Review Gate, SpecBridge PR Review Report, and Claude Review Non Blocking. Local CI parity is covered by specbridge-smoke.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records the reconciliation, changed files, local validation evidence, GitHub CI evidence, policy result, low risk result, no deployment, no unresolved risks, and merged PR #204 status.

findings.evidence: After adding closure evidence, historical reconciliation ledger entries, and PR #204 post-merge memory, specbridge-doctor -FixPlan -Offline reports health=healthy and action_count=0.
findings.recommendation: Use issue-182 MCP resources as the next governed operator task if doctor remains healthy.
